content: Liver is packed with critical nutrients for childhood development, including vitamin A, heme iron, and vitamin B12.
CoQ10, taurine, and zinc are powerful nutrients found in heart, supporting cellular energy, brain development, and immune resilience.
Grass-fed meat is highly bioavailable, making it easier for kids to absorb and utilize protein.
Lineage Meat Sticks deliver 64g of protein, zero carbs, and a full spectrum of micronutrients.
Organ meats like liver and heart are nutrient-dense and can be included in snacks without being noticeable.
